item.phantasystar.hp_unit.tooltip:
A reinforcing unit for protective gear.
Boosts HP when equipped.
item.phantasystar.body_unit.tooltip:
A reinforcing unit for protective gear.
Boosts Armor when equipped.
item.phantasystar.legs_unit.tooltip:
A reinforcing unit for protective gear.
Boosts Movement Speed when equipped.
item.phantasystar.power_unit.tooltip:
A reinforcing unit for protective gear.
Boosts Attack Damage when equipped.
item.phantasystar.resist_unit.tooltip:
A reinforcing unit for protective gear.
Boosts Knockback Resistance when equipped.
item.phantasystar.battle_unit.tooltip:
A reinforcing unit for protective gear.
Boosts Attack Speed when equipped.
item.phantasystar.v101.tooltip: When equipped, this unit will increase Attack Damage, Movement Speed, Armor, and Luck. It also boosts Attack Speed.
item.phantasystar.swordsman_lore.tooltip:
§bSEALED
§fArmor unit for Hunters.
It increases sword skills after extensive use.
item.phantasystar.proof_of_sword_saint.t: Raises Movement Speed by 30%, Armor Penetration by 20%, lowers Armor by 20% when equipped.
item.phantasystar.poss_limiter.tooltip:
§bSEALED
§fLowers your Attack Damage, Attack Speed, Movement Speed, and Armor.
item.phantasystar.adept.tooltip:
Raises your Attack Damage, Movement Speed, Attack Speed, and Knockback Resistance by 10%.
Also increases Armor by 4.
item.phantasystar.saber.tooltip: A sword with a Photon blade. Attacks 1 enemy.
item.phantasystar.sword.tooltip: A large weapon with a Photon blade.
item.phantasystar.partisan.tooltip:
A long sword with a Photon blade.
Hits multiple enemies.
item.phantasystar.db_saber.tooltip:
Replica of a saber once used by the military.
An extremely common replica.
item.phantasystar.flowen_sword_replica.t:
Replica of a sword once used by the military.
An extremely common replica.
item.phantasystar.musashi.tooltip: A pair of swords bearing the name of a double sword wielding master.
item.phantasystar.dragon_slayer.tooltip:
A legendary sword borne by one who defeated a dragon.
Adds an explosive fire attack.
item.phantasystar.yamato.tooltip:
A pair of swords bonded with ultra low temperature Photons.
Its special attack freezes enemies
item.phantasystar.guren.tooltip: A pair of swords bearing the name of a double sword wielding master.
item.phantasystar.shouren.tooltip: A pair of swords bearing the name of a double sword wielding master.
item.phantasystar.jizai_guren.tooltip:
One of two unparalleled blades from a homeworld.
Can cause instant death.
item.phantasystar.jizai_shouren.tooltip:
One of two unparalleled blades from a homeworld.
Can cause instant death.
item.phantasystar.jizai_container.toolti:
One of two unparalleled blades from a homeworld.
Can cause instant death.

§bThis weapon will split into §eJIZAI (GUREN) §band §eJIZAI (SHOUREN) §bupon crafting so they can be wielded together.
item.phantasystar.lame_dargent.tooltip:
§bSEALED
§fA dazzling silver sword that shines brightly.
item.phantasystar.excalibur.tooltip: A golden sword that gets even more powerful by sacrificing HP for a powerful attack.
